blended.narrative: Monarch Mountain is looking at a solid round of snow over the next 48 hours, with 9 inches of light, fluffy snow expected. Snow levels around 6,967 ft. The 14-day outlook shows 9 inches total.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: 5" of snow, highs of 35°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Tomorrow: 4" of snow, highs of 26°F. Expect powder.

recent_conditions.narrative: 1.2" of new snow in the past 48 hours. Snowpack is holding steady. Current depth: 24".
